hero.title: OmniLaTeX
hero.description: A modular document class for LuaLaTeX, built on KOMA-Script. 27 document types, 21 institutions, 25 languages.

features.title: Features
features.doctypesDesc: Thesis, article, CV, letter, presentation, poster, exam, book, and more.
features.institutionsDesc: Pre-configured branding for MIT, Stanford, ETH, Oxford, and 17 more.
features.languagesDesc: English, German, Chinese, Arabic, Japanese, Korean, and 20 more.
features.reproducibleDesc: Docker and Nix support. Identical output across all platforms.

gallery.title: PDF Gallery
gallery.description: Browse 50 example documents compiled with OmniLaTeX.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.description: Everything you need to use, configure, and extend OmniLaTeX.
